---
title: "Demo Interactive"
author:
  - name: Franz Zieris
    email: franz.zieris@bth.se
date: 2026-04-02
format: html
server: shiny
execute: 
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: load-libraries
#| message: false
library(targets)
```

```{r}
#| context: data

# "context: data" makes this available for the UI context and for the server context

data = tar_read(data)
```

## Work Hours

```{r}
selectInput("language", "Programming Language:", unique(data$lang), selected = "Java")
plotOutput("whoursPlot")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-java-whours
#| fig-cap: Work time spent on Java programs
#| warning: false
#| context: server
source("R/plot.R")
output$whoursPlot <- renderPlot({
     data |>
        plot_work_hours(input$language)
})
```
